text.title: Storybook Setup — Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed when storybook-setup is mis-applied, each with symptom, root cause, and concrete fix.

antipattern.reason: Root cause: Loses argTypes inference; deprecated in v8. Fix: Use CSF3 with satisfies Meta.
Root cause: Docs page is empty; team writes MDX manually. Fix: Add tags: ['autodocs'].

antipattern.description: Default story args = {} on a component with required prop label.
antipattern.reason: Root cause: Console error; Chromatic snapshot fails. Fix: Provide all required props in default args.
Root cause: Visual regressions ship. Fix: Add Chromatic step; require approval on changes.
